seoTitle: Wynn Vale vs Yacka — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wynn Vale and Yacka. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wynn Vale vs Yacka: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wynn Vale and Yacka.
heading: Wynn Vale vs Yacka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wynn Vale, South Australia and Yacka, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wynn Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Yacka (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wynn Vale or Yacka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wynn Vale has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Yacka scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wynn Vale scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Yacka scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wynn Vale or Yacka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wynn Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
